## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is not `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow repository rules
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`/`CHANGELOG.md`) when behavior changed
- [ ] No breaking change, or migration notes included

npm test
